falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its 52-week high by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout invalidates the 'HOLD' signal and suggests the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 30-day average daily volume within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a blowoff top scenario, contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict and suggesting a reversal rather than a hold.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.5% and stays above for 7 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp rise in bond yields would signal strong risk-on sentiment, invalidating the 'HOLD' by proving the pattern is not a bottom but a bullish catalyst.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
